title: Auto-approval for CISO privileged checkouts
compensating_controls: All CISO sessions recorded and reviewed by Board Audit Committee quarterly; session recordings retained 24 months; CISO checkouts flagged in weekly privilege report
review_outcome: Renewed — Board reviewed Q3 CISO sessions. No anomalies. Extended to 2026-01-15.

title: Extended break-glass review period for holiday incidents
compensating_controls: Break-glass events during Dec 20 - Jan 5 holiday period may extend post-review to 10 business days instead of 5; must still be completed before Q4 audit close
review_outcome: Active — no holiday break-glass events yet at review date.
